parsed.summary: The change looks solid and shippable as-is. It is a minor version bump (v0.4.3 to v0.4.4) primarily focused on UX polish and metadata cleanup. The core functional change involves adding an interactive `AskUserQuestion` menu to `commands/setup.md` for users who invoke `/glm:setup` when already fully configured, safely mapping new menu options to existing CLI flags handled by the unchanged companion script. The secondary change is the removal of the `@skylab` npm scope from `package.`, which has zero functional impact since the package is private and unscoped in its imports. All version bumps and changelog updates are consistent, and the rollback strategy is low-risk.
